creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for this PR Oliver, but we are aware of ports that don't build
with Clang -- Florent has some exp-runs for this.

If you would like to get involved with the effort, please investigate:

http://wiki.freebsd.org/PortsAndClang

There's not a lot of point in reporting a problem with no fix for this
at the current time :)

Chris
